seo.mainTitle: INXORA: B2B marketplace for industrial supplies in Peru
seo.introP1: INXORA is Peru's first B2B marketplace focused on industrial supplies, connecting industrial companies with verified suppliers nationally and internationally. Our platform lets buyers quote, compare, and purchase specialized technical products in one place—reducing fragmentation and delays typical of traditional procurement.
seo.introP2: Unlike generalist marketplaces, INXORA is built for the technical buyer: purchasing and logistics managers, maintenance engineers, and supply leads in agroindustry, manufacturing, mining, energy, and construction. We know that a wrong component spec can mean hours of plant downtime.

stats.repurchase: Repurchase rate among active industrial customers
stats.companies: Industrial companies in the active portfolio in Peru
stats.support: Always-on support with AI assistant Sara Xora

how.title: How does INXORA work?
how.p1: The buying process is designed to be simple, fast, and traceable. You submit your requirements list and receive a consolidated quote with final prices in soles, including VAT and shipping—without contacting multiple suppliers: INXORA centralizes everything.
how.p2: Once the purchase order is confirmed, we procure directly from suppliers, coordinate dispatch, and keep the buyer informed in real time.

sara.title: Sara Xora: AI for the industrial buyer
sara.body: Sara Xora is our AI-powered commercial assistant, trained on industrial supplies. It answers technical questions, checks availability, and manages quotes 24/7. Complex cases are escalated to specialized engineers.

coverage.title: National coverage and financing
coverage.body: INXORA serves companies across Peru's key productive sectors: agroindustry, manufacturing, mining, and energy. We ship to Metropolitan Lima, Callao, and all regions with verified logistics partners. Each shipment includes electronic invoice, dispatch note, and quality certificates when applicable.

financing.title: Financing for purchase orders
financing.body: We offer financing on confirmed orders for individuals with a business and companies with an active tax ID. Through our crowdlending model, qualified buyers receive materials immediately and complete payment when their operation generates cash flow—positioning INXORA as a strategic industrial supply partner beyond traditional distributors.

libroReclamaciones.title: Complaints Book
libroReclamaciones.subtitle: In accordance with Law No. 29571, we make our Virtual Complaints Book available to you. No field is required and you can submit anonymously. We commit to respond within no more than 15 business days.
libroReclamaciones.exito: Your complaint has been sent successfully! We will contact you shortly.

avisosLegales.linea1: * Filing a complaint does not exclude the use of other means of dispute resolution nor is it a prerequisite for filing a complaint with Indecopi.
avisosLegales.linea2: * The provider must respond to the complaint within no more than fifteen (15) calendar days, and may extend the period for up to fifteen days.
avisosLegales.linea3: * By signing this document, the customer authorizes to be contacted after the complaint process to assess the quality and satisfaction of the complaint handling process.

libroReclamaciones.politicaPrivacidad: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy and the Cookies Policy.
